query:
SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug, COUNT(u.id) as user_count
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN user u ON u.organizationId = o.id
WHERE o.slug IN ('srv-boulder', 'srv-rrmc')
GROUP BY o.id, o.name, o.slug;
